title: Waymo and Uber quietly part ways in Phoenix
summary: Waymo and Uber have ended their partnership in Phoenix after nearly three years of collaboration. The move marks a significant shift in their autonomous vehicle strategies in the region.
content: The companies confirmed to TechCrunch that their unusual partnership in Phoenix recently ended after nearly three years..

zh.title: Waymo和Uber在凤凰城悄然分手
zh.summary: Waymo与Uber结束了他们在凤凰城近三年的合作伙伴关系。这一举措标志着两家公司在该地区自动驾驶汽车战略的重大转变。

title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
summary: Anthropic has partnered with California Governor Newsom to provide Claude AI services to state government at 50% discount. The deal represents Anthropic's expansion into government partnerships while potentially creating tension with federal administration officials.
content: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

zh.title: Anthropic与加州州长纽森达成协议 加州政府可半价使用Claude
zh.summary: Anthropic与加州州长纽森合作，向州政府提供Claude AI服务，享受50%折扣。该协议代表Anthropic进入政府合作领域的拓展，同时可能与联邦政府官员产生紧张关系。

title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘ RAMageddon’
summary: South Korea's leading memory chip manufacturers are investing over $550 billion to address the global memory shortage constraining AI development. This massive investment aims to position South Korea as a key AI technology hub.
content: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

zh.title: 南韩科技巨头承诺投入5500多亿美元以缓解"内存危机"
zh.summary: 南韩领先的存储芯片制造商正在投入5500多亿美元，以解决制约AI发展的全球存储短缺问题。这笔巨大投资旨在将南韩定位为关键的AI技术中心。

title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
summary: Arena, which operates the widely-used free AI model leaderboard, has reached a $100 million valuation following its commercial service launch last September. The milestone reflects growing demand for AI benchmarking and evaluation services.
content: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

zh.title: Arena这个被广泛使用的AI排行榜现已成为一个1亿美元的业务
zh.summary: Arena运营着被广泛使用的免费AI模型排行榜，在去年9月推出商业服务后达到了1亿美元的估值。这个里程碑反映了对AI基准测试和评估服务日益增长的需求。

title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
summary: Cursor has released a mobile app that allows developers to monitor and control their AI coding agents remotely. The app extends Cursor's functionality beyond desktop environments for on-the-go oversight.
content: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

zh.title: Cursor现在有一个移动应用来指导你随时随地的编码代理
zh.summary: Cursor发布了一款移动应用，允许开发者远程监控和控制他们的AI编码代理。该应用将Cursor的功能扩展到桌面环境之外，用于随时随地的监督。

title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
summary: Trump administration regulatory actions are jeopardizing 92 gigawatts of planned new electricity capacity and $121 billion in solar and wind power investments. Solar and wind currently represent the largest sources of new U.S. power generation capacity.
content: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new capacity in the U.S.

zh.title: 特朗普政府用监管措施威胁92吉瓦的新电力供应
zh.summary: 特朗普政府的监管行动正在危害92吉瓦的计划新电力容量和121亿美元的太阳能和风能投资。太阳能和风能目前是美国新增电力容量的最大来源。

title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
summary: TIDAL is implementing measures to combat AI-generated music by blocking monetization and removing songs that impersonate artists using automated detection tools. The move reflects music industry concerns about AI-generated content and artist impersonation.
content: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.

zh.title: TIDAL通过断绝变现来打击AI音乐
zh.summary: TIDAL正在采取措施打击AI生成音乐,通过阻止变现和使用自动化检测工具删除冒充艺术家的歌曲来应对。这一举措反映了音乐行业对AI生成内容和艺术家冒充的担忧。

title: In major privacy win, Supreme Court rules geofence warrants are protected by privacy rights
summary: The Supreme Court has limited the use of geofence warrants, ruling that privacy rights protect against their broad application. While privacy advocates sought an outright ban, the decision represents a significant victory for digital privacy protections.
content: The Supreme Court's decision to limit geofence warrants is a win for privacy advocates, who called their use unconstitutional but sought an outright ban.

zh.title: 隐私重大胜利:最高法院裁定地理围栏搜查令受隐私权保护
zh.summary: 美国最高法院限制了地理围栏搜查令的使用,裁定隐私权保护免受其广泛应用。虽然隐私倡导者寻求完全禁止,但该决定代表了对数字隐私保护的重大胜利。

title: F1 in Austria: Starts off exciting, then goes the opposite way
summary: The Austrian Grand Prix featured dramatic early racing action followed by changing conditions, with heatwave impact and engine upgrades generating interest. The event also showcased power level adjustments for the next two seasons.
content: A heatwave, engine upgrades, plus power levels for the next two seasons.

zh.title: F1奥地利站:开局刺激,随后风云突变
zh.summary: 奥地利大奖赛以戏剧性的早期赛车行动开始,随后条件改变,热浪影响和引擎升级引起了关注。该赛事还展示了未来两个赛季的动力级别调整。

title: WhatsApp now lets you reserve usernames
summary: WhatsApp is allowing users to reserve custom usernames between 3 and 35 characters long. The feature provides a way for users to establish consistent identities on the messaging platform.
content: WhatsApp username can be between 3 to 35 characters.

zh.title: WhatsApp现在让您保留用户名
zh.summary: WhatsApp允许用户保留3至35个字符的自定义用户名。该功能为用户提供了在消息平台上建立一致身份的方式。

title: Wildwood featurette lifts the veil on building its stop-motion world
summary: A new featurette for 'Wildwood' reveals the filmmaking process behind its stop-motion animation world. Director Travis Knight, known for the Oscar-nominated 'Kubo and the Two Strings,' leads the project.
content: Director Travis Knight is also the creative mind behind 2016's Oscar-nominated Kubo and the Two Strings.

zh.title: Wildwood特辑揭开了构建其定格动画世界的面纱
zh.summary: 《Wildwood》的新特辑揭示了其定格动画世界背后的电影制作过程。导演特拉维斯·奈特（以奥斯卡提名的《库博和两根魔弦》而闻名）领导了该项目。

title: In a bold move, Rocket Lab acquires Iridium Communications
summary: Rocket Lab has announced the acquisition of satellite communications company Iridium Communications, with executives calling it transformative for the space industry. The deal consolidates satellite communications and launch capabilities under one company.
content: "We believe this will be one of the most transformative deals in the space industry."

zh.title: 火箭实验室大胆收购铱星通讯公司
zh.summary: 火箭实验室宣布收购卫星通讯公司铱星通讯，高管称这对太空产业具有变革性。该交易将卫星通讯和发射能力整合在一家公司旗下。

title: Think tank games out how to respond to disaster scenarios in space warfare
summary: A think tank is modeling response protocols for disaster scenarios in potential space warfare conflicts. The analysis explores critical questions about proportional reactions and escalation thresholds in space domain conflicts.
content: "Where does the threshold live that an action necessitates some proportional reaction?"

zh.title: 智库模拟太空战争灾难场景应对方案
zh.summary: 一家智库正在为潜在太空战争冲突中的灾难场景建立应对协议模型。该分析探讨了关于太空域冲突中相称反应和升级阈值的关键问题。

title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
summary: Rocket Lab is acquiring satellite communications company Iridium in an all-stock deal valued at $8 billion, strengthening its competitive position against Amazon and SpaceX. The acquisition marks the latest in a series of strategic purchases by the launch provider.
content: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.

zh.title: 火箭实验室继续并购热潮，收购卫星公司铱星
zh.summary: 火箭实验室以全股票方式收购卫星通信公司铱星，交易价值80亿美元，增强了其对抗亚马逊和SpaceX的竞争地位。此次收购是该发射服务提供商战略性购买的最新举措。

title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
summary: Robotics startup Proception has settled a trade secret lawsuit with Tesla and secured an $11 million funding round. The company is developing innovative approaches to training data collection for robotic hand manipulation, one of robotics' hardest problems.
content: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

zh.title: 机器人手公司与特斯拉和解商业秘密诉讼并获1100万美元融资
zh.summary: 机器人创业公司Proception已与特斯拉和解商业秘密诉讼，并获得1100万美元融资。该公司正在开发创新方法来收集机器人手臂操纵的训练数据，这是机器人技术最具挑战的问题之一。

title: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
summary: Pocket has raised $11 million in funding for its AI-powered note-taking device, a $129 credit card-shaped puck that attaches to smartphones. The device offers unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do item management, positioning itself in the growing market for AI-enabled productivity hardware.
content: Pocket sells a $129, credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions and to-do items.

zh.title: Pocket获得1100万美元融资,看好AI笔记设备市场需求
zh.summary: Pocket为其AI驱动的笔记设备获得1100万美元融资,这款设备形似信用卡,售价129美元,可附加到智能手机上。该设备提供无限录音、转录和待办事项管理功能,在不断增长的AI生产力硬件市场中占据一席之地。

title: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
summary: Flipper Devices has launched the Busy Bar, a customizable productivity display designed to reduce workplace distractions and improve focus. The device will retail for $249.
content: Flipper Device's new Busy Bar will retail for $249.

zh.title: Flipper设备推出新款Busy Bar,可定制生产力显示屏
zh.summary: Flipper Devices推出了Busy Bar,这是一款可定制的生产力显示屏,旨在减少工作场所干扰并提高专注力。该设备的零售价为249美元。

title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
summary: Omen AI secured $31 million in Series A funding to develop technology for monitoring data center chip coolant systems and preventing bacterial contamination. The startup aims to optimize data center operations and reduce infrastructure failures.
content: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

zh.title: Omen AI的数据中心优化计划前景可观
zh.summary: Omen AI获得3100万美元A轮融资,开发用于监控数据中心芯片冷却液系统和防止细菌污染的技术。该初创公司旨在优化数据中心运营并减少基础设施故障。

title: The Flipper Zero creators’ Busy Bar productivity display will go on sale next month
summary: The Busy Bar from Flipper Zero creators will launch on July 14th with three pricing tiers: $179 for waitlist customers, $199 for the first 3,000 units, and $249 regular retail. The pixelated LED display device is designed to signal focus time and reduce workplace distractions.
content:
The Busy Bar makes it obvious to others when you don’t want to be distracted. | Image: Flipper Devices	

First announced over a year ago in April 2025, the Busy Bar will be available for purchase starting on July 14th when the device also starts shipping. Created by the same team behind the Flipper Zero wireless multitool, the Busy Bar is instead described as a "productivity multitool" that relies on a pixelated LED display to help reduce distractions and improve focus. The first 3,000 units purchased on July 14th will be discounted to $199, but the Busy Bar will normally retail for $249. Those who previously joined the Busy Bar waitlist will still be able to purchase one next month for $179.
The Busy Bar looks a lot like an alarm clock, but i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Flipper Zero 创建者的 Busy Bar 生产力显示屏将于下月上市
zh.summary: Flipper Zero 创建者推出的 Busy Bar 将于 7 月 14 日发布，分为三个价格等级：等候名单客户为 179 美元，前 3,000 个单位为 199 美元，常规零售价为 249 美元。这款像素化 LED 显示设备旨在表示专注时间并减少工作场所的干扰。

title: How to end a TV show
summary: Mystery-packed television series often struggle to deliver satisfying conclusions after building complex narratives, as exemplified by shows like Lost and the MGM Plus series From. The challenge of resolving multiple plot threads while meeting viewer expectations remains a significant hurdle for showrunners.
content:
Ending any story is hard, but that's especially true of mystery-packed TV shows. Series like Lost initially hook viewers with constantly building secrets and questions, to the point that they can often seem incomprehensible. But the promise is that it will all pay off in the end - a feat that few shows ultimately manage. This creates tension as viewers try to put all of the pieces together while hoping that the show's creators know what they're doing in the long run. The latest example is From on MGM Plus, a Lost-style horror series that just wrapped up its penultimate season, with a fifth and final one coming in 2027. Naturally, endings are …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何结束一部电视剧
zh.summary: 充满神秘的电视连续剧在构建复杂叙事后往往难以提供令人满意的结局，如《Lost》和 MGM Plus 剧集《From》所示。在解决多条情节线索同时满足观众期望方面存在的挑战仍然是编剧面临的重大障碍。

title: Comcast is splitting in two
summary: Comcast announced plans to split into two publicly traded companies, separating its profitable broadband and wireless business from its media assets including NBCUniversal and Sky. The separation is expected to be completed within approximately one year, with shareholders receiving shares in both resulting companies.
content:
Comcast has announced plans to separate itself into two publicly traded companies, spinning off its NBCUniversal and Sky broadcasting arms. The shake up aims to protect the media conglomerate's profitable broadband and wireless brand, which will retain the "Comcast" company name, as its media and entertainment business - now collectively named "NBCUniversal" - faces increasing pressure from industry consolidation and streaming rivals.
The separation is expected to take approximately a year, with Comcast shareholders owning shares in both Comcast and NBCUniversal upon completion. While current Comcast CEO Brian L. Roberts will be "actively i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 康卡斯特正在分裂成两家公司
zh.summary: 康卡斯特宣布计划分裂成两家上市公司，将其盈利的宽带和无线业务与包括 NBCUniversal 和 Sky 在内的媒体资产分开。预计分离将在大约一年内完成，股东将获得两家公司的股票。

title: The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it
summary: A new federal policy proposal containing language attacking "woke" policies poses a potential threat to scientific research and the careers of thousands of U.S. scientists. The policy changes could have far-reaching implications for the scientific community and national research competitiveness.
content:
A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there's still time to fight it.
On May 29th, the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) issued a 412-page proposal to revise federal financial assistance. The language is a combination of distinctly Trumpian attacks on "woke" policies and boring governmentese designed to make your eyes glaze over as quickly as possible. But under phrases like "providing further clarification on the regulatory status of the OMB requirements" is something darker - a threat to scientific research in this country, the livelihoods of thousands of scientists, and the li …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 反"觉醒"政策之争可能改写美国科学格局
zh.summary: 一项新的联邦政策提案中包含攻击"觉醒"政策的表述，对科学研究和数千名美国科学家的职业生涯构成潜在威胁。这些政策变化可能对科学界和国家研究竞争力产生深远影响。

title: NASA's X-59 "frankenjet" tests supersonic flight without the sonic boom
summary: NASA's X-59 experimental aircraft has successfully demonstrated supersonic flight capabilities while eliminating the traditional sonic boom through advanced aerodynamic design. The breakthrough technology could enable future supersonic flights over populated areas without environmental disruption.
content: NASA’s quiet supersonic flight tests could eventually go on a national tour.

zh.title: NASA X-59"科学怪人飞机"成功进行无音爆超音速飞行测试
zh.summary: NASA X-59实验飞机通过先进的气动设计成功演示了超音速飞行能力，同时消除了传统音爆。这一突破性技术未来可能使超音速飞行在人口密集地区进行而不会造成环境干扰。
